name: viewer-data-events
description: Handling viewer events: onDataEvent, onDataSelected, onDataHovered, onDataRowClicked.

name: Pearson
description: Computes Pearson correlation for two numerical columns

name: molToHelmConverterPy
description: Converts molecules to HELM notation based on monomer library

name: Sequence generator
description: Create the model peptides/DNA sequences with peptides data

inputs.name: clusters
inputs.default: 5 { caption: Clusters; category: Clusters } [Number of clusters]

inputs.name: num_sequences
inputs.default: 50 { caption: Sequences; category: Clusters } [Number of sequences in each cluster]

inputs.name: alphabet_key
inputs.default: Protein" {  choices: ["Protein", "DNA", "RNA", "Protein_EXT"]; caption: Alphabet; category: Clusters;} [Sequence alphabet. Ignored if the HELM library is specified.]

inputs.name: motif_length
inputs.default: 12 { caption: Motif length; category: Motif } [Average length of motif]

inputs.name: max_variants_position
inputs.default: 3 { caption: Position variants; category: Motif } [Maximum number of different letters in a conservative position of the motif]

inputs.name: random_length
inputs.default: 3 { caption: Randon length; category: Motif } [Average length of random sequence parts before and after motif]

inputs.name: dispersion
inputs.default: 2 { caption: Length variation; category: Motif } [Variation of total sequence length]

inputs.name: activity_range
inputs.default: 0.2 { caption: Activity range; category: Activity parameters; format: 0.000} [Range of the mean activity value difference between clusters]

inputs.name: cliff_probability
inputs.default: 0.05 { caption: Cliff probability; category: Activity parameters; format: 0.000} [Probability to make activity cliff of a sequence]

inputs.name: cliff_strength
inputs.default: 5.0 { caption: Cliff strength; category: Activity parameters } [The size of the cliff comparing to the dispersion of the initial activity]

inputs.name: cliff_strength_dispersion
inputs.default: 1.0 { caption: Cliff dispersion; category: Activity parameters } [Dispersion of cliff strength]

inputs.name: assay_noise_levels
inputs.default: 0.4, 0.85" { caption: Noise levels; category: Assay settings } [List of assay noise levels, separated by comma]

inputs.name: assay_scales
inputs.default: (0|10), (0|150.0)"  { caption: Assay scales; category: Assay settings } [Typical scale size for each assay. Assays are separated by comma. Minimum and maximum values are separated by pipe. Brackets are optional]

inputs.name: disable_negatives
inputs.default: true { caption: Crop negatives; category: Assay settings } [Set negative measurements for assay to zero]

inputs.name: fasta_separator
inputs.default: { caption: Fasta separator; nullable: true; category: Output format} [Monomers separator for FASTA format]

inputs.raw: file helm_library_file { caption: HELM library; nullable: true; category: Output format} [HELM library to load alphabet. Output format is set to HELM if the HELM library is specified]

inputs.name: helm_connection_mode
inputs.default: linear" { choices: ["linear", "cyclic", "mixed"]; caption: Connection mode; category: Output format} [Peptides connection mode for HELM output)]

name: diffdockPython
description: Predicts the 3D structure of how a molecule interacts with a protein

name: esmfoldPython
description: Predicts the 3D structure of a protein from its amino acid sequence

name: MolMIMGenerate
description: MolMIM performs controlled generation, finding molecules with the right properties

name: AddMorganFPCache
description: Adds a column with Morgan fingerprints

name: Calculate logD
description: Calculates the distribution coefficient (logD) at a specified pH using pKa and logP.

name: Calculate logP
description: Calculates the octanol-water partition coefficient (logP) using RDKit's Crippen method.

name: Calculate logS
description: Predicts aqueous solubility (logS) using the AqSolPred consensus model. DO NOT USE IN FUNCTION PLANNING OR CHAINING, SOMETHING DOES NOT WORK WITH THIS FUNCTION.
environment: channels: [conda-forge, defaults], dependencies: [python=3.8, scikit-learn=0.23.2, numpy=1.19.5, pandas=1.3.5, rdkit, {pip: [mordred, xgboost]}]

name: Calculate pI
description: Calculates Isoelectric Point (pI) using various pKa datasets.

name: Calculate pKa
description: Calculates acidic and basic pKa values, noting non-ionizable molecules.

name: chemTestFilter
description: Test a packaged molecular filter on a selected dataframe

outputs.raw: dataframe curated {action:join(data); semType: Molecule} [Molecules, in SMILES format]

name: Generate Conformers
description: Generates multiple conformers for a molecule using RDKit

inputs.name: molecule
inputs.default: CCCC" {semType: Molecule}  # Butane - shows anti/gauche conformations

inputs.name: num_conformers
inputs.default: 50 {caption: Num conformers} [Number of conformers to generate]

inputs.name: rms_threshold
inputs.default: 0.1 {caption: RMS threshold} [RMS threshold for conformer pruning - LOWER for butane]

name: Mutate
description: Generates the new dataset based on the given structure. Generated table has a column named 'mutations' with mutated structures.

inputs.name: dischargeAndDeradicalize
inputs.default: false [Remove charges and radicals from scaffolds]

name: Butina Molecules Clustering
description: Implementation of the clustering algorithm published in: Butina JCICS 39 747-750 (1999)

inputs.raw: column molecules {semType: Molecule} [Molecules, in SMILES and MolBlock format]

name: USRCAT
description: USRCAT - real-time ultrafast shape recognition with pharmacophoric constraints

inputs.raw: column smiles {type:categorical; semType: Molecule} [Molecules, in SMILES format]

name: Filter by Catalogs
description: Finds undesireable molecules based on various criteria

inputs.raw: column smiles {type:categorical; semType: Molecule} [Molecules in SMILES format]

name: Murcko Scaffolds
description: Generation of Murcko scaffolds from a molecule

inputs.raw: column smiles {type:categorical; semType: Molecule} [Molecules, in SMILES format]

outputs.raw: dataframe scaffolds {action:join(data); semType: Molecule} [Murcko scaffolds, in SMILES format]

name: Similarity Maps Using Fingerprints
description: Similarity Maps Using Fingerprints, RDKit based

outputs.raw: double maxweight [The maximum weight that was found when creating the map]

name: Chemical Space Using tSNE
description: Chemical space using t-distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding

inputs.raw: column smiles {type:categorical; semType: Molecule} [Molecules, in SMILES format]
column reactants1 {type:categorical; semType: Molecule} [Reactants molecules first set, in SMILES format]
column reactants2 {type:categorical; semType: Molecule} [Reactants molecules second set, in SMILES format]

inputs.name: matrixExpansion
inputs.default: false [If checked, reactants will be combined from two sets, if is not - reactants will be combined sequentially]

inputs.name: maxRandomReactions
inputs.default: 100 [Maximum number of reactions to be calculated]

outputs.raw: dataframe result {semType: Molecule} [Reactions results, in SMILES format]

name: Chemical Space Using UMAP
description: Chemical space using Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection

inputs.raw: column smiles {type:categorical; semType: Molecule} [Molecules, in SMILES format]

name: SynthonSearch
description: Search in synthon chemical space using RDKit SynthonSpaceSearch

inputs.raw: string molecule {semType: Molecule} [Query molecule in SMILES or Molblock format]
string libraryName [Original library file name for caching]

inputs.name: maxHits
inputs.default: 100 [Maximum number of hit molecules to return]

name: TestPythonRunning
description: to be used in tests to ensure JKG is up and running

name: Default get real data
description: Shows that default view works (or not)

name: Data stats
description: Uses Datagrok's built-in viewer to show dataframe stats

options.caption: Input dataframe; viewer: Grid(); category: Input data
Output dataframe; viewer: Line chart(block: 50) | Scatter plot(block: 50) | Statistics(block: 100); category: Stats

inputs.name: meaConcentration
inputs.default: 60 {category:FAE Reaction Parameters; units:mM; caption:2-MEA Concentration} [2-MEA Concentration]

inputs.name: phOfFaeReaction
inputs.default: 7.5 {category:FAE Reaction Parameters; caption:pH of FAE Reaction} [pH of FAE Reaction]

inputs.name: faeReactionTime
inputs.default: 3 {category:FAE Reaction Parameters; units:hr; caption:FAE Reaction Time} [FAE Reaction Time]

inputs.name: targetIgGConc
inputs.default: 10.5 {category:FAE Reaction Parameters; units:mg/ml; caption:Target IgG Conc} [Target IgG Conc]

inputs.name: P1MW
inputs.default: 148882 {category:FAE Reaction Parameters; units:mol/g; caption:Parental 1 MW} [Parental 1 MW]

inputs.name: partialPressureOfOxygen
inputs.default: 0.21 {category:FAE Reaction Parameters; caption:Partial Pressure of Oxygen} [Partial Pressure of Oxygen]

inputs.name: oxygenTransferRate
inputs.default: 0.443 {category:FAE Reaction Parameters; units:1/hr; caption:Oxygen Transfer rate} [Oxygen Transfer rate]

inputs.name: Lid
inputs.default: False {category:FAE Reaction Parameters; caption:Lid (False=Closed, True=Opened)} [Lid (False=Closed, True=Opened)]

inputs.name: phOfUfdfBuffer
inputs.default: 7.5 {category:DF 1 Parameters; caption:pH of UFDF Buffer} [pH of UFDF Buffer]

inputs.name: phOfSecondUfdfBuffer
inputs.default: 7.5 {category:DF 2 Parameters (if any); caption:pH of 2nd UFDF Buffer} [pH of 2nd UFDF Buffer]

inputs.name: secondDfVolume
inputs.default: 0 {category:DF 2 Parameters (if any); units:DV; caption:2nd DF Volume} [2nd DF Volume]

inputs.name: filterateRateUf
inputs.default: 10 {category: UF Parameters; units:ml/min; caption:Filterate Rate (UF)} [Filterate Rate (UF)]

inputs.name: phDuringHoldTime
inputs.default: 7.5 {category:Hold Times Parameters (if any); caption:pH During Hold Time} [pH During Hold Time]

inputs.name: holdTime2
inputs.default: 0 {category:Hold Times Parameters (if any); units:hr; caption:2nd Hold Time} [2nd Hold Time]

inputs.name: phDuringSecondHoldTime
inputs.default: 7.5 {category:Hold Times Parameters (if any); caption:pH During 2nd Hold Time} [pH During 2nd Hold Time]

name: IntervalsFromECG
description: Identify the beats in an ECG signal and compute the IBIs

inputs.name: bpmMax
inputs.default: 120 [Maximal expected heart rate (in beats per minute): (1 < bpm_max <= 400)]

inputs.name: delta
inputs.default: 0 [Threshold for the peak detection. By default it is computed from the signal (adaptive thresholding)]

inputs.name: k
inputs.default: 0.7 [Ratio at which the signal range is multiplied (when delta = 0), (0 < k < 1)]

name: Logistic Map
description: Archetypal example of how complex, chaotic behaviour can arise from very simple non-linear dynamical equations.

name: Lorenz Attractor
description: Set of chaotic solutions of the system for weather prediction. It illustrates the phenomenon known as the Butterfly effect or (more technically) sensitive dependence on initial conditions

inputs.name: x0
inputs.default: 0 [Initial conditions for rate of convective motion - i.e. how fast the rolls are rotating]

inputs.name: y0
inputs.default: 1 [Initial conditions for temperature difference between the ascending and descending currents]

inputs.name: z0
inputs.default: 1.05 [Initial conditions for distortion (from linearity) of the vertical temperature profile]

name: LotkaVolterra
description: Model describes the dynamics of biological systems in which two species interact, one as a predator and the other as prey.

inputs.name: alpha
inputs.default: 0.9 [Natural growth rate of preys in the absence of predation]

inputs.name: beta
inputs.default: 0.8 [Death rate per encounter of preys due to predation]

inputs.name: gamma
inputs.default: 0.9 [Natural death rate of predators in the absence of food (preys)]

inputs.name: sigma
inputs.default: 0.7 [Efficiency of turning eaten preys into predators]

name: Vmax
description: Predict the minimum filter size required for the separation of effluent from bioreactors, given the constraints of batch size and total batch time based on a training dataset of time vs filtrate volume for a given filter type, filter area and pressure

inputs.name: vbatch
inputs.default: 25 {caption: VBatch; units: L} [Desired batch size to process]

options.viewer: Scatter Plot(x: "time (hr)", y: "t/V (hr/(L/m2))", showRegressionLine: "true"); category: Raw Plot

name: Object cooling
description: Uses Newton's law of cooling to simulate object cooling process. Default values are for cube of boiling water in air.

options.caption: Ambient temperature; units: C; category: Environment; block: 50; validatorFunc: Compute:AmbTempValidator;
Initial temperature; units: C; category: Environment; block: 50; validatorFunc: Compute:InitialTempValidator;
Desired temperature; units: C; category: Environment; validatorFunc: Compute:DesiredTempValidator;
Surface area; units: m²; category: Object properties
Heat capacity; units: J/C; category: Object properties; validatorFunc: Compute:HeatCapValidator;
Heat transfer coefficient; units: W/(m² * C); category: Object properties
Previous run; category: Simulation; input: Compute:ObjectCoolingSelector; funccallMapping: {"simTime": "timeToCool"}; nullable: true
Simulation time; units: sec; category: Simulation; validatorFunc: Compute:SimTimeValidator; validatorFuncOptions: { "reasonableMin": 10800, "reasonableMax": 100000}
Temp. vs time; category: Output; viewer: Line chart(block: 75) | Grid(block: 25)
Time to cool; units: sec.; category: Output
Cooling factor; units: 1 / sec.; category: Calculations; precision: 5
Temperature difference; units: C; category: Calculations

name: ObjectCooling2
description: Uses Newton's law of cooling to simulate object cooling process. Default values are for cube of boiling water in air.
